title: CRISIS AND URGENT WALK-IN SERVICES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS MENTAL HEALTH CENTER CRISIS AND URGENT WALK-IN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an urgent mental health walk-in center. Offers crisis stabilization services including counselors, peer support, case management, crisis intake assessment, referral to medical services and general resources. 11211 SE 82nd Avenue Suite O Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis and Support line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk-in Mental Health Center: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm Mobile Crisis Response: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 655-8585 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis and Support Line (503) 655-8585 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for crisis services FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Ross Center near Clackamas Town Center Services: In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Drop In Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - CLACKAMAS MHC JAIL DIVERSION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS MENTAL HEALTH CENTER
